action: Keep benchmark-specific code isolated in benchmark-exp/memoryarena/adapter and benchmark-exp/memoryarena/scripts, with condition-scoped stores under benchmark-exp/memoryarena/runs/EXP-04/stores/<condition>/<task_group>. Core Experience Brain modules should stay generic and not import benchmark-only helpers; the adapter layer should own leakage scanning and benchmark protocol glue.
